testcase.name: test_no_join_message_disconnects_within_10s
testcase.failure:
/usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:500: in wait_for return fut.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/connection.py:305: in recv return await self.recv_messages.get(decode) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/messages.py:158: in get frame = await self.frames.get(not self.closed) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/messages.py:51: in get await self.get_waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: tests/test_ws_room_backend.py:197: in test_no_join_message_disconnects_within_10s await asyncio.wait_for(ws.recv(), timeout=15) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:502: in wait_for raise exceptions.TimeoutError() from exc E TimeoutError
